title: URAQT Number Candles 7, Birthday Cake Candles, Gold Glitter Birthday Number Candle, Suitable for Kids and Adults, Can Decorate Birthday Parties, Wedding Anniversary Parties, Graduation Party, Etc
features: High Quality Raw Materials:Birthday candles are made of quality smokeless wax.Eco-friendly and non-toxic.Easy to insert and light.Burning evenly and consistently.
Delicate Look:Happy birthday candles come in gold vivid color and glow bright in dark light.Make your birthday cake special and stand out.
Wide Usage:Suitable for many occasions, such as birthday, baby showers, anniversaries, retirement parties and so on, the candle holder would not break your cake and convenient to use.
Perfect Size:12.5 x 3.5x1cm.Gold number candles hold up well on the cake in right weight and length.
Warm Note:Keep the candle away from fire when using it, keep away from children when burning.
description: Product Description Come on, I know you're looking for me. Shine your party! URAQT birthday candles are made of quality smokeless wax, no-harmful and non-toxic. Metallic number candles come in gold vivid color and glow brightly in dark light. Make your birthday cake special and stand out. Birthday cake candles burned with a nice steady flame. Make the cake look extra special and beautiful. URAQT number candles are suitable for a birthday party, kid's school manual activity, baby shower, wedding, anniversary and also great for your lovely pets! Give your little buddy a surprise! Mix Number Matching your need to make a combination with those gold birthday number candles from 0-9, which can add a special touch to topper cupcakes or adorn a birthday cake. URAQT Number Candles Gold glitter candles make your party more colorful and unique. Number Height: 1.8 inch Total Height: 4.6 inch Material: Made of high-quality smokeless wax. Each package includes 1 number candle and packed in a kraft paper box. Healthy and environmental processing technology to make candle core smokeless and tasteless, no harm to both adults and kids. The candles holder is long enough that would not break your cake and easy insert. Elegant Number Candles for All Occasions
